testcase.name: test_add_positives
testcase.failure:
def test_add_positives(): > assert add(2, 3) == 5 E assert 0 == 5 E + where 0 = add(2, 3)
tests\test_solution.py:4: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_add_negatives
testcase.failure:
def test_add_negatives(): > assert add(-1, -1) == -2 E assert 0 == -2 E + where 0 = add(-1, -1)
tests\test_solution.py:7: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_add_zero
testcase.failure:
def test_add_zero(): > assert add(0, 5) == 5 E assert 0 == 5 E + where 0 = add(0, 5)
tests\test_solution.py:10: AssertionError
